subject: native WebGPU validation subject

invariants.statement: The diagnostic mosaic is assembled from live final, no-post, normal, and emissive output-node captures.
invariants.metric: mean RGB byte difference from final
invariants.blockingFailure: diagnostic routes collapse to final output

allowedDivergences: Correctness capture only; no sustained performance window was run.
The quality governor was not exercised.
One resolved render timestamp proves availability but not per-stage GPU attribution.
Authored direct visual signoff is absent; visualCorrectness remains INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE.
Software-adapter timestamps are retained only as diagnostic data and cannot support a hardware performance claim.
Owned adapter identity, features, and limits are serialized; physical display refresh and presentation cadence were not measured by this profile.
